sources.title: PSA Announces $200 Million Infrastructure Investment to Support Global Demand
sources.useCase: Broad grading-demand infrastructure signal; not a One Piece price guarantee.
sources.notes: PSA article dated May 14, 2026 describes grading demand and infrastructure investment.

sources.title: Ahoy! PSA x Bandai Partner on Third Exclusive ONE PIECE Promo
sources.useCase: Promo collaboration demand signal and PSA/Bandai relationship context.
sources.notes: Use carefully as a promo-signal source, not as evidence that every promo appreciates.

sources.title: One Piece Collecting Basics Guide
sources.useCase: Set-code, expansion, rarity, and Bandai 2022 launch context.
sources.notes: Good source for explaining OP/ST/PRB/product-code basics.

sources.title: Bandai Namco Integrated Report 2025
sources.useCase: Corporate context for Bandai card-business and IP strategy.
sources.notes: Use as background business context, not item-level pricing.

sources.title: BOOSTER PACK -CARRYING ON HIS WILL- [OP-13]
sources.useCase: OP13 context for Sabo, Newgate, and Carrying on His Will cards.
sources.notes: Official product context.

sources.title: EXTRA BOOSTER -ONE PIECE HEROINES EDITION- [EB-03]
sources.useCase: Heroine/Nami/Yamato/female-lead demand context.
sources.notes: Official product context.

sources.title: BOOSTER PACK -THE AZURE SEA'S SEVEN- [OP14-EB04]
sources.useCase: Seven Warlords, Mihawk, Crocodile, Boa, and January 16, 2026 release context.
sources.notes: Official page lists Warlords theme, Jan. 16, 2026 release, MSRP, card count, and Mihawk super alternate art.

sources.title: OP14-EB04 Release Event
sources.useCase: Pre-release/release-event stamped card and local-store timing context.
sources.notes: Official event page lists Jan. 9-15, 2026 event period and release-event pack details.

sources.title: ONE PIECE CARD GAME English Version 3rd Anniversary Set
sources.useCase: August 2026 drop watchlist and Luffy/Ace/Sabo Three Brothers product context.
sources.notes: Official page lists Delivery Month August 2026, MSRP USD $120.00, and contents.

sources.title: Collect-a-Con Cape Town
sources.useCase: Local Cape Town selling/networking/event route.
sources.notes: Use only for local event/channel context; verify specific dates before acting.

sources.title: About The Card Cache
sources.useCase: Cape Town local store, One Piece singles/sealed/graded-card route.
sources.notes: Page describes Cape Town-based online store and One Piece TCG support.

sources.title: TCGXchange South Africa
sources.useCase: Cape Town online TCG store and local sealed/accessory route.
sources.notes: Page describes Cape Town base and South Africa shipping.

sources.title: Wizards Books and Games
sources.useCase: Local store route; verify One Piece stock/event details before acting.
sources.notes: Local channel placeholder in strategy until live stock/event pages are verified.

sources.title: Sell Your Collectibles to Millions
sources.useCase: US-oriented selling-channel context.
sources.notes: Useful for channel comparison; practical access depends on region/account constraints.

sources.title: Cardmarket One Piece
sources.useCase: EU liquidity/price-check route where practical.
sources.notes: Useful for European market observation; selling access may depend on region/account status.

sources.title: The eBay Vault pricing and fees
sources.useCase: Vault/selling fee context.
sources.notes: Verify account/location eligibility before using.

sources.title: Collectr visible portfolio capture

sources.notes: Read-only capture; no sensitive account data stored.

sources.notes: Shipping/order logistics redacted.
